description: Configure a secured 'Real-time Visitor Map' widget for a public lobby display. The IT department needs to display a live map of visitors on a monitor without requiring a manual login or admin access. Create a new user with the login 'lobby_display' and grant them 'View' permission only for the 'Initial Site'. Generate an API Auth Token for this user and use it to create an HTML file at /home/ga/lobby_widget.html containing the 'Real-time Map' widget iframe. The widget must be configured to load without authentication by appending the user's API token to the URL. Login: admin / Admin12345.
